name: The Mud Bog
blowByText: Lose 2 Momentum and 1 card from hand.

name: Tight Trees
blowByText: Row 1 shifts 1 lane away from Center.

name: Rapid Berms
blowByText: Shift Row 2 and Row 3 one lane Right.

name: Log Skinny
blowByText: Cannot Pedal or use Momentum this turn.

name: Granite Slab
blowByText: Your Row 1 token cannot move next turn.

name: Rooty Drop
blowByText: Take 2 Hazard Dice and end turn immediately.

name: Slippery Berm
blowByText: Shift Row 1 and Row 2 three lanes.
